zh.Hatton, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾哈頓
zh.Haverhill, Essex County, Massachusetts,: 美國麻薩諸塞州艾可哈維爾爾
zh.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可哈維爾爾
zh.lifeSummary: Ann於大約1595年出生在英國。她於大約1618年與John Eaton在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1660年2月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可哈維爾爾享年66歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可哈維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ann于大约1595年出生在英国。她于大约1618年与John Eaton在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1660年2月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可哈維爾爾享年66岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可哈維爾爾。

meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Ann was born about 1595, in England. She married John Eaton about 1618, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 5 February 1660, in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 66, and was buried in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Ann est née environ 1595, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé John Eaton environ 1618, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 février 1660, à Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Ann wurde um 1595 in England geboren. Sie hat um 1618 in England John Eaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Februar 1660 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

Morì il 5 febbraio 1660, nel Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Hatton, Warwickshire, England: イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアハットオン

ja.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスヘイバーヒル
ja.lifeSummary: Annは約1595年にイギリスで生まれた。約1618年にイギリスでJohn Eatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1660年2月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスヘイバーヒルで66歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスヘイバーヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 하버힐
ko.lifeSummary: Ann(은)는 대략 1595년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1618년 영국에서 John Eaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1660년 2월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 하버힐에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 하버힐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ann nasceu aproximadamente 1595, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Eaton aproximadamente 1618, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1660, em Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Ann родилась около 1595 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Eaton около 1618 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 5 февраля 1660 г. в местности хавирилл, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности хавирилл, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.
